groups.label: SDK workflow security: ReDoS, shell injection, and process spawner
groups.rationale: Three distinct SDK workflow files with no overlap to other groups: step-executor has a bug, channel-messenger has a ReDoS vulnerability, and process-spawner has a shell injection issue. Grouped together as they are related SDK workflow modules.
